title: rhododendron occidentale
intro: Rhododendron occidentale, also known as the Western Azalea, is a species of flowering plant native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Western Azalea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used to treat colds, sore throats, and skin irritations.
